_comment_: PV_SHOESTRING (Pyrcz 2004) — mud-prone basin with isolated meandering channel shoestrings. Single-preset config so the sampled ranges stay inside the natural envelope of this architecture. Run with run_pv_shoestring.sh on Perlmutter CPU. Every kwarg from MeanderingChannelLayer.create_geology() is enumerated below; varied params have a 'range' (we want diversity), fixed params have a 'value' (we don't expect variability is informative). Comments tagged 'skip — preset default' duplicate the PV_SHOESTRING dict in resmill/layers/channel.py and can safely be removed (the preset already supplies them). Comments tagged 'skip — class default' duplicate MeanderingChannelLayer.create_geology()'s kwarg defaults and can also be removed. Lines without a 'skip' note are either VARIED (range) or DELIBERATELY SET (value differs from preset/class).

grid._comment_dx_: dx=dy=10m, dz=1m. PV channels are 32-50m wide -> 3-5 cells. Migration step ~35m -> 3.5 cells/event.

preset._comment_: Pyrcz 2004 mud-prone shoestring architecture. Locks the rest of the kwargs to PV_SHOESTRING's baseline unless overridden below.

NTGtarget._comment_: VARIED. PV-shoestring NTG range — mud-prone basin so most of the cube is FF, baseline 0.10.

mCHsinu._comment_: VARIED. Mean channel sinuosity. PV baseline 1.6 (meandering). Range [1.30, 1.85] = semi-straight to highly sinuous.

mCHwdratio._comment_: VARIED. PV channel width:depth. Narrow [8, 14] preserves PV's shoestring identity.

mCHdepth._comment_: VARIED. Channel depth (m). Range [3, 10] keeps deep stacks below half of z_len so several levels still fit (nlevel auto-tunes inversely).

probAvulInside._comment_: VARIED. Probability of in-belt avulsion per event. PV baseline 0.05; low keeps shoestrings narrow rather than spreading laterally.

mFFCHprop._comment_: VARIED. Abandoned-channel mud-plug fraction. Widened to [0.0, 0.3] for visual variability.

mdistMigrate._comment_: VARIED. Mean migration distance per event in meters. PV baseline 35. Lower -> tighter bends; higher -> more lateral wandering.

azimuth._comment_: VARIED. Flow direction (deg, clockwise from +x). Channels are not 180-symmetric so the full circle matters.

nlevel._comment_: AUTO. nlevel = clip(50 / mCHdepth, 2, 12). Deeper channels stack fewer levels; shallower stack more — basin always full.

level_z._comment_: skip — class default. Explicit z-positions; null = engine spreads evenly.

ntime._comment_: per-level event budget (30 events × nlevel total). Sized so each level fills with the preset's typical channel density.

ntime_per_level._comment_: TRUE so every level gets its own event budget (independent of how many lower levels consumed). Without this, deep levels starve when NTGtarget=0.99 stops never firing.

probAvulOutside._comment_: skip — preset default (also class default). Out-of-belt avulsion probability. PV's shoestring isolation comes from this being low.

stdevCHsinu._comment_: skip — preset default (also class default). Per-event std of sinuosity.

stdevCHdepth._comment_: skip — preset default (also class default). Per-event std of channel depth.

stdevCHdepth2._comment_: skip — class default. Secondary depth std (depth-mixture).

stdevCHwdratio._comment_: skip — preset default (also class default). Per-event std of W:D.

stdevdistMigrate._comment_: skip — preset default (also class default). Per-event std of migration distance.

mCHazi._comment_: skip — class default. Engine-internal compass azimuth; the top-level 'azimuth' above is what actually rotates the model.

mCHsource._comment_: skip — class default. null = sample randomly along inflow boundary.

stdevCHsource._comment_: skip — class default. Wide spread = multi-channel belts. Drop to ~1 only for MEANDER_OXBOW (single deterministic channel).

mLVdepth._comment_: skip — preset default. Mean levee depth (m). PV overrides class default 1.0 -> 0.6.

stdevLVdepth._comment_: skip — preset default. PV overrides class default 0.2 -> 0.1.

mLVwidth._comment_: skip — preset default (also class default). Mean levee width (m).

mLVheight._comment_: skip — preset default. PV overrides class default 0.5 -> 0.4.

mLVasym._comment_: skip — preset default (also class default). Levee asymmetry (concave-bank vs convex-bank thickness).

mLVthin._comment_: skip — class default. Vertical thinning of levee away from channel.

mCSnum._comment_: splays disabled — adds visual complexity without diagnostic value; future versions can re-enable.

mCSnumlobe._comment_: skip — class default. Mean lobes per crevasse splay.

mCSsource._comment_: skip — class default. Mean splay source position along the channel.

mCSLOLL._comment_: skip — class default. Mean splay long-lobe length (m).

mCSLOWW._comment_: skip — class default. Mean splay long-lobe width (m).

mCSLOl._comment_: skip — class default. Mean splay short-lobe length (m).

mCSLOw._comment_: skip — class default. Mean splay short-lobe width (m).

mCSLO_hwratio._comment_: skip — class default. Splay height:width ratio.

mCSLO_dwratio._comment_: skip — class default. Splay scour-depth:width ratio.

stdevFFCHprop._comment_: skip — preset default (also class default). Per-event std of FFCH plug fraction.

mNeckFFCHprop._comment_: skip — preset default (also class default). Neck-cutoff oxbow mud plug. 0.0 = pure Alluvsim. Set 0.5 only for MEANDER_OXBOW preset.

Cf._comment_: skip — preset default. PV overrides class default 0.0078 -> 0.0036 (Pyrcz Table 1 PV-shoestring hydraulics).

scour_factor._comment_: skip — preset default. PV overrides class default 2.0 -> 10.0.

gradient._comment_: skip — preset default (also class default). Channel-belt gradient.

Q._comment_: skip — preset default (also class default). Bankfull discharge (m^3/s).

CHndraw._comment_: skip — class default. Streamline draws per channel; engine internal.

ndiscr._comment_: skip — class default. Streamline discretisation; engine internal.

nCHcor._comment_: skip — class default. Channel-correlation half-window; engine internal.
